old_value: {"id":"smallhold-5kp","title":"Content rendering pipeline (markdown, mentions, hashtags)","description":"Implement the pipeline that converts post text input into stored content_html. Steps: 1) Parse @mentions (local and remote), link them. 2) Parse #hashtags, link them. 3) Render markdown to HTML with pulldown-cmark. 4) Sanitize HTML with ammonia. 5) Store original text in posts.content and rendered HTML in posts.content_html. 6) Create mention rows in the mentions table for each @mention.","design":"Mention parsing: regex or nom parser for @user@domain and @user (local). Resolve local mentions to accounts table, remote to remote_accounts (resolve if not cached). ammonia::Builder with allowlist of tags: a, br, p, strong, em, pre, code, ul, ol, li, blockquote. Hashtag parser: #[a-zA-Z0-9_]+ not followed by alphanumeric.","acceptance_criteria":"@username@domain mention links to the remote profile URL; #hashtag becomes a link; markdown bold/italic/links render correctly; ammonia strips disallowed HTML tags; mention rows are created in mentions table; mention notification is created for mentioned local actors","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:02:26Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:02:26Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-4xr","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:02:44Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
